headerDisplay: Jaguar Land Rover InControl via [Smartcar API](https://smartcar.com). Create a free app at [dashboard.smartcar.com](https://dashboard.smartcar.com), add `http://localhost:52625/callback` as redirect URI, then paste your credentials below.

redirectUri.title: OAuth Redirect URI
redirectUri.description: Must exactly match what you entered in the Smartcar dashboard.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to fetch vehicle state. At 300 s ≈ 8,640 calls/month (Starter plan). At 1800 s ≈ 1,440/month (Free plan).

notifyWebhookUrl.title: Re-auth notification webhook URL (optional)
notifyWebhookUrl.description: When the Smartcar token is about to expire (7 days before), a POST request with JSON body is sent here. Works with ntfy.sh, Pushover, Home Assistant webhooks, n8n, etc. Leave empty to disable.

pin.title: Vehicle PIN (reserved)
pin.description: Currently unused. Reserved for future JLR security PIN support.
